release_notes: V14.44 build 200 sensor header compile-fix release: keeps the build 199 sensor header alternation behaviour where sensor expiry warnings use the main header message area for 2 minutes in every 5-minute cycle while WiFi bars stay visible, then returns to the normal child-name, time and update-envelope header for 3 minutes; adds explicit Arduino forward declarations to fix compile-order errors, and preserves the build 198 trend buffer validation, WiFi, Nightscout, 1-hour mini-trend, IOB, COB, SAGE and audio alarm logic.
